CVE-2020-37248.title: OfflineIMAP before 8.0.3 trusts the server with their STARTTLS ca ...
CVE-2020-37248.description: OfflineIMAP before 8.0.3 trusts the server with their STARTTLS capability prior to authentication, which allows STRIPTLS/man-in-the-middle attacks, taking over the connection and extracting account credentials in cleartext.
